title: About
text:
Hierarchical grouping and visual summary of EF2023 data.
Note: Tabs are sorted by decreasing total quantity (as per value cards). This means the top category is listed second, following Total.
Hierarchy:
 ─┬ Production
  │ ├ Crude Oil
  │ │ ├ Total
  │ │ ├ (Upgraded Bitumen)
  │ │ ├ C5+
  │ │ ├ Conventional Heavy
  │ │ ├ Conventional Light
  │ │ ├ Field Condensate
  │ │ ├ In Situ Bitumen
  │ │ └ Mined Bitumen
  │ ├ Hydrogen
  │ │ ├ Total* (*calculated) (PENDING)
  │ │ ├ Biomass
  │ │ ├ Electrolysis
  │ │ └ Natural gas with CCS
  │ └ Natural Gas
  │   ├ Total
  │   ├ Solution
  │   ├ Non Associated
  │   ├ Tight
  │   ├ Shale
  │   ├ Coalbed Methane
  │   └ ...
  └ Prices
    ├ Benchmark Prices
    └ ... End-use Prices
...
